display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A perplexing case for the Canadian Victorian detective. Murdoch attends a meeting for a eugenics society where the guest is the great writer, HG Wells.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown investigates staff at the local health spa when an ex-employee is found murdered.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick is called to the scene of a fireman's death, but is knocked out while looking for the murder weapon, causing him to lose his memory and revert to his con-artist self.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Superintendent Donovan decides to transport an inmate who was his former partner, he finds himself confronting the past and caught up in a daring escape.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: An ambitious reporter turns up dead after breaking a story implicating a high-ranking official in a sex scandal, leading Carrie and Al into the murky world of newsroom politics.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The island's favourite radio presenter is murdered live on air and Jack must find the culprit - while being observed by an officer from internal affairs.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. A White Siberian tiger goes berserk and escapes into the city.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A perplexing case for the Canadian Victorian detective. Murdoch attends a meeting for a eugenics society where the guest is the great writer, HG Wells.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick is called to the scene of a fireman's death, but is knocked out while looking for the murder weapon, causing him to lose his memory and revert to his con-artist self.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Superintendent Donovan decides to transport an inmate who was his former partner, he finds himself confronting the past and caught up in a daring escape.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown investigates staff at the local health spa when an ex-employee is found murdered.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: An ambitious reporter turns up dead after breaking a story implicating a high-ranking official in a sex scandal, leading Carrie and Al into the murky world of newsroom politics.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The island's favourite radio presenter is murdered live on air and Jack must find the culprit - while being observed by an officer from internal affairs.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. When a bride-to-be is killed on her hen party, Goodman tries to unravel the murder.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Flambeau is incarcerated under suspicion of murder, but denies killing his cohort Flynn, and asks Father Brown to hear his confession if he is convicted.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown investigates staff at the local health spa when an ex-employee is found murdered.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The island's favourite radio presenter is murdered live on air and Jack must find the culprit - while being observed by an officer from internal affairs.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Superintendent Donovan decides to transport an inmate who was his former partner, he finds himself confronting the past and caught up in a daring escape.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. A White Siberian tiger goes berserk and escapes into the city.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: When a juror at Susan's first solo trial dies, another juror - a former local beauty queen - is charged with murder. Margaret and Todd search for the truth.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After brake failure causes a train derailment, Ogden and Brackenreid find a murdered passenger and suspect sabotage.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a confidence man, who preys on wealthy, older women, is found dead in a hotel room, Crabtree's aunt is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: I Know What You Did Last Autumn: It's Halloween and a killer in a clown costume is on the loose, terrorising young couples and sending Murdoch on a chilling chase.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet
programme.desc: With a notorious serial killer on the loose Eliza is caught in the middle of a clash between Fleet Street and Scotland Yard.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet
programme.desc: Eliza's life is turned upside down when she finds herself dragged into a missing persons case with recently released convict Patrick Nash.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. When a bride-to-be is killed on her hen party, Goodman tries to unravel the murder.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams stars as the crime-solving priest, who this time sets out to protect an old friend by investigating a 300-year-old secret hidden in a university.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest has his work cut out thanks to Sid, who is released from prison, but then accused of murdering his former defence barrister in a ghastly manner.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When popular radio quiz Up To You comes to Kembleford, the sleuthing padre suspects that one of the cast are responsible for their landlady's murder.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: GK Chesterton's sleuthing padre gets involved once again to investigate the murder of a Colonial Postal Service officer, when the fair comes to Kembleford.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. When a bride-to-be is killed on her hen party, Goodman tries to unravel the murder.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Amidst several personal revelations, Arch's investigation into Gallagher comes to a head when a murdered body washes up the shore.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Sarah and Rex are kidnapped by a criminal mastermind intent on turning Rex into a weapon. Mark and Jesse race to locate them before his deadly plan succeeds.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. When a bride-to-be is killed on her hen party, Goodman tries to unravel the murder.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. The team is introduced to the world of rock and roll when the singer of a band is murdered.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams stars as the crime-solving priest, who this time sets out to protect an old friend by investigating a 300-year-old secret hidden in a university.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul heads to County Durham for a 1936 Singer Le Mans sports car and a 1957, one-owner Lambretta LD 150, while Derek gets his hands on a 1962 MGA MK2 Coupe.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: World War II as told by the late Laurence Olivier. Hear more about life on the British Home Front, a time of gas masks, digging for victory and evacuation.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A vast network of Nazi bunkers buried in the Hague tells the story of the greatest battle of WWII that never was.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Hampton Court Castle in Herefordshire, where items include a silver dish given to a former prime minister.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce looks back at memorable finds from past series, and the experts investigate whether a viewer's piece of jewellery is one of the rarest of its kind.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek goes to pick up a veteran 1904 Swift, there's an emotional farewell to a 1980s Bedford HA van, and a Toyota Corona finds a new home.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek gives the once-over to a Royale Formula Ford race car, and Paul is on a marathon trip to pick up a 1953 MGYB, a Moggy Van, and an '80s Yamaha 250RD motorbike.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: World War II as told by the late Laurence Olivier. Hear more about life on the British Home Front, a time of gas masks, digging for victory and evacuation.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A vast network of Nazi bunkers buried in the Hague tells the story of the greatest battle of WWII that never was.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Hampton Court Castle in Herefordshire, where items include a silver dish given to a former prime minister.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie returns to where his boating life began, exploring London's canals on Naughty Lass. He travels through Little Venice and moors in Paddington Basin.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming discovers a mysterious message in a bottle on the Ashby Canal and calls in to meet a mate who lives on an old narrowboat.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when the Naughty Lass collides with a low bridge on the Bumble Hole Canal Branch damaging a chimney.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek goes to pick up a veteran 1904 Swift, there's an emotional farewell to a 1980s Bedford HA van, and a Toyota Corona finds a new home.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek gives the once-over to a Royale Formula Ford race car, and Paul is on a marathon trip to pick up a 1953 MGYB, a Moggy Van, and an '80s Yamaha 250RD motorbike.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: Colin brings a rare Ford Zephyr into the 21st Century, a VW Beach Buggy is tuned by ear, and a E-Type Jag gets supersized air filters.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a military vehicle enthusiast, where Henry mirror polishes a decommissioned missile and Simon repurposes a tank turret.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A Barnes Wallis catapult is fixed by volunteers, but can they bounce bombs on water like the dam busters? A Triumph car is put through its paces in a road test.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A young racing driver learns how to handle the Napier-Railton. Plus, a race winning Harrier jet, and pilot, are reunited.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: The motorbike team create a new lubrication system to keep a 1930s BSA motorbike running. Plus, a Mini Metro and red Corvette turn heads at the Members Classic Car Show. S2 Ep.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway have a night-time track walk exploring long forgotten stations on the District line in Whitechapel.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore Clapham South deep level shelter where thousands of Londoners slept in the war.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the disused Jubilee line areas of Charing Cross station, now more famous as a film location.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway discover the hidden world of the Waterloo and City, the only line entirely underground.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will hunt down an affordable Italian car, and eventually find an Alfa Romeo 155 hiding in a barn. Making space for an inspection proves a challenge.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus buy a Porsche 923 with a cracked interior, bad paintwork and ripped seats. This driving legend is well past its best, but they still hope to turn a profit.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie's narrowboat gets a makeover before he explores the River Thames, he moors in Abingdon and tackles an emergency DIY repair to fix a leak.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie visits a former Beatle's home in Henley, uncovers horror history in Marlow and struggles to find a mooring in Maidenhead on the River Thames.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie's narrowboat gets stuck under a low bridge on the challenging Basingstoke Canal as he battles through water weed. Can he make it to journey's end.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon journeys from Oman to the Maldives, where the tropical coral islands are being damaged by bleaching and an entire island has been manufactured as a landfill dump.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon finds out about battles in Sri Lanka, then moves on to Bangladesh, where he hears about the fast-growing industry providing prawns for the West.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels from Indonesia to Australia, visiting the epicentre of the 2004 tsunami, investigating the trade in illegal pets and meeting a crocodile hunter.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and daughter Kate collect a Series 1 Land Rover, while Jack collects an unusual wartime paratrooper's bike in Scarborough.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Making Dave go weak at the knees is a very rare eighties hot hatch - a Citroen Visa GT Tonic.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A legendary diesel locomotive, that's undergone over half a million pounds worth of repairs must be hauled over 40 miles ready for a diesel gala.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is heading to Scotland to collect a 'special' Bentley that's been created by a very talented amateur.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Paul and Debbie are trying to complete their impressive tower stairwell. Nick and Nicole need to finish their kitchen and dining room in time for a first birthday party.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Paul and Trent want to escape their busy lives to a 600-acre conservation property, protecting endangered gum trees and native wildlife. Due to terrain challenges, it becomes a treehouse.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Agnes is disappointed with Cathy when she decides to get a boob job to impress her boyfriend, Professor Clowne.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond The Lobby
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work at Stanglwirt Hotel in the Austrian Alps, owned by one family for 300 years and offering world-class sports facilities and elegant Lipizzan horses.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: George fears that Weld’s losing its innocence. Brother Terry proposes to Hannah and there’s a surprise visit from a very pregnant Jan. S2 E15

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Fishing and Adventure
programme.desc: The crew head to Opotiki for a head to head challenge to catch a snapper the closest to 70cm. With a guaranteed consequence on the line, the boys go toe to toe with the fish and each other.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Dairying as an escalator to farm ownership; future thinking and sustainability at the heart of decision-making for Rabbidge Farms; and developing premium ciders from New Zealand bred apples.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: On Giants’ Shoulders: A Wairarapa family farming on an historic sheep station, honours the past, prepares for the future, and enjoys a shared love of the ocean with their community.

programme.title: Dog Squad Puppy School
programme.desc: Season Finale: A very special occasion for Police pups Tahi and Wren, speed dating for the Biosecurity ‘O’ litter and a matching for Kauri Dieback detector Marty. S4 E10

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa simplify some traditional festive dishes that can be a bit tricky to get right with a menu that includes a gorgeous alternative to Christmas pudding.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Australia
programme.desc: Rick motors up the NSW North Coast to see how the popularity of its iconic laid-back lifestyle is shaping food and dining.

programme.title: Make It At Market
programme.desc: Mosaic artist Dionne from Bedfordshire and animal head embroiderer Alan from Derby are both hoping to make their dreams of a creative career come true.

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: The Italian supercar and the Aussie superstar, and there’s magic in the air when a minivan driver is found with mushrooms.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Join us for live coverage of the Group G match between New Zealand and Belgium from BC Place in Vancouver, Canada.

programme.title: Tipping Point: Best Ever Finals
programme.desc: Look back at some of the most dramatic end games in Tipping History, including agonising trades and jackpot counters teetering on the edge.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent Continued
programme.desc: Britains Got Talent is back for the first live Semi Final, who will impress enough to make the live final?

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Season Finale: Scottish painter/decorator Craig tries to fake it as a high-fashion makeup artist.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Join us for a replay of the Group G match between New Zealand and Belgium from BC Place in Vancouver, Canada.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Everyone in the Brown family has a date for Valentine's Day except Agnes. Can she really start internet dating at her age?

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The team works tirelessly to prove a landlord's culpability after a building collapse leaves multiple people dead and injured. S2 E11

programme.title: Critical Incident
programme.desc: Discovering that Dalia is now a fully-fledged drug dealer, a horrified Zil realizes he has created a criminal and decides that he must be the one to fix it. S1 E5

programme.title: The Au Pair
programme.desc: Season Finale: The family is thrust into a confrontation that forces long-buried secrets to the surface. With trust hanging by a thread, Zoe must make a life-altering choice. S1 E4

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Dairying as an escalator to farm ownership; future thinking and sustainability at the heart of decision-making for Rabbidge Farms; and developing premium ciders from New Zealand bred apples.

programme.title: Barkley Manor
programme.desc: Krista attempts to crack Britney the Chihuahua’s resting disdain-face. Nati throws a mega-party for Max the bulldog’s birthday. Kirsten and James try to solve their little dog’s big problem. S1

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Songs Of Praise
programme.desc: Inspiring hymns and songs, together with uplifting stories of faith from around the UK and beyond.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Susan visits Wales' wonderful south coast and the gorgeous Gower Peninsula as she takes in the extravagant Cardiff Castle, a unique game of Welsh baseball, and the National Botanic Garden.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Waka Huia
programme.desc: Waka Huia is an iconic archival documentary series recording the unique stories and histories of Maori for all New Zealanders.

programme.title: Marae
programme.desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Join us for live coverage of the Group K match between Congo DR and Uzebekistan from Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta, Georgia.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon finds out about battles in Sri Lanka, then moves on to Bangladesh, where he hears about the fast-growing industry providing prawns for the West.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels from Indonesia to Australia, visiting the epicentre of the 2004 tsunami, investigating the trade in illegal pets and meeting a crocodile hunter.

programme.title: This World: The Tea Trail with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels to East African countries Kenya and Uganda to meet some of the millions of people involved in producing tea and learn more about the processes involved.

programme.title: This World: The Coffee Trail With Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve heads to Vietnam to uncover the stories behind the morning pick-me-up. He travels to the central highlands, where he meets the people who grow, pick and pack coffee.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon finds out about battles in Sri Lanka, then moves on to Bangladesh, where he hears about the fast-growing industry providing prawns for the West.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels from Indonesia to Australia, visiting the epicentre of the 2004 tsunami, investigating the trade in illegal pets and meeting a crocodile hunter.

programme.title: This World: The Tea Trail with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels to East African countries Kenya and Uganda to meet some of the millions of people involved in producing tea and learn more about the processes involved.

programme.title: This World: The Coffee Trail With Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve heads to Vietnam to uncover the stories behind the morning pick-me-up. He travels to the central highlands, where he meets the people who grow, pick and pack coffee.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More ducking and diving with the Boswell family. Mrs Boswell seeks the help of a psychiatrist when her entire clan is thrown into disarray by Aveline's phantom pregnancy.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Liverpudlian japes in the family sitcom. When Mongy the dog is accused of biting a neighbour's child, Mrs B receives a visit from the police and passionately defends the animal.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's long-running sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. Here, there's trouble for Shifty, problems for Joey, Billy and Mrs Boswell, but good news for Aveline and Oswald.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More Liverpudlian larks in Carla Lane's popular 1980s sitcom. Jack has hit the bottle. Meanwhile, Freddie is torn between his loyal wife and the passionate Lilo Lill.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: After Butterflies, writer Carla Lane returned to her native Liverpool for this family sitcom. There's a new look for Billy, a new love for Jack and a new problem for Freddie.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's sitcom about a close-knit, Liverpudlian family. The Boswell boys are in love, and Oswald is confused by Aveline's overnight transformation into a career woman.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More ducking and diving with the Boswell family. Mrs Boswell seeks the help of a psychiatrist when her entire clan is thrown into disarray by Aveline's phantom pregnancy.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Liverpudlian japes in the family sitcom. When Mongy the dog is accused of biting a neighbour's child, Mrs B receives a visit from the police and passionately defends the animal.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's long-running sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. Here, there's trouble for Shifty, problems for Joey, Billy and Mrs Boswell, but good news for Aveline and Oswald.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More Liverpudlian larks in Carla Lane's popular 1980s sitcom. Jack has hit the bottle. Meanwhile, Freddie is torn between his loyal wife and the passionate Lilo Lill.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: After Butterflies, writer Carla Lane returned to her native Liverpool for this family sitcom. There's a new look for Billy, a new love for Jack and a new problem for Freddie.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's sitcom about a close-knit, Liverpudlian family. The Boswell boys are in love, and Oswald is confused by Aveline's overnight transformation into a career woman.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More ducking and diving with the Boswell family. Mrs Boswell seeks the help of a psychiatrist when her entire clan is thrown into disarray by Aveline's phantom pregnancy.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Liverpudlian japes in the family sitcom. When Mongy the dog is accused of biting a neighbour's child, Mrs B receives a visit from the police and passionately defends the animal.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's long-running sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. Here, there's trouble for Shifty, problems for Joey, Billy and Mrs Boswell, but good news for Aveline and Oswald.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More Liverpudlian larks in Carla Lane's popular 1980s sitcom. Jack has hit the bottle. Meanwhile, Freddie is torn between his loyal wife and the passionate Lilo Lill.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: After Butterflies, writer Carla Lane returned to her native Liverpool for this family sitcom. There's a new look for Billy, a new love for Jack and a new problem for Freddie.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's sitcom about a close-knit, Liverpudlian family. The Boswell boys are in love, and Oswald is confused by Aveline's overnight transformation into a career woman.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More ducking and diving with the Boswell family. Mrs Boswell seeks the help of a psychiatrist when her entire clan is thrown into disarray by Aveline's phantom pregnancy.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Liverpudlian japes in the family sitcom. When Mongy the dog is accused of biting a neighbour's child, Mrs B receives a visit from the police and passionately defends the animal.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Ben Robinson discovers more about the quiet village of Ravenglass in the Lake District's National Park, which played a strategic role in the Roman empire.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a country estate in Ireland where family divisions reflected a national struggle and was caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Anchieta, a tropical island complex in Brazil and the scene of a dramatic uprising.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring the ruined site of Troy, that helped decode one of the world's most enduring mysteries.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Seodaemun Prison, a facility in Seoul that helped spawn a legend known as South Korea's Joan of Arc.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a country estate in Ireland where family divisions reflected a national struggle and was caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Anchieta, a tropical island complex in Brazil and the scene of a dramatic uprising.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring the ruined site of Troy, that helped decode one of the world's most enduring mysteries.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Seodaemun Prison, a facility in Seoul that helped spawn a legend known as South Korea's Joan of Arc.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Ken falls in love with the girlfriend of one of Wolfie's prison-bound friends and arranges to take her away for the weekend, but Wolfie tags along to keep an eye on things.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Following a by-election humiliation in which he gained a mere 6 votes, Wolfie plans to kidnap the Conservative who beat him. There's nothing as bad as democracy.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: When a customer starts chatting up Shirley in the shop, she decides to move on from Wolfie - which means the fearless leader may have to move out of her spare room.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie is on the lookout for any money-making opportunity he can find. When Ken's attention is firmly taken up by pavement art, Citizen Smith may have found his answer.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Speed is due out of prison after an 18-month sentence, and Wolfie's not looking forward to informing him that his long-term girlfriend is pregnant.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Ken falls in love with the girlfriend of one of Wolfie's prison-bound friends and arranges to take her away for the weekend, but Wolfie tags along to keep an eye on things.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Following a by-election humiliation in which he gained a mere 6 votes, Wolfie plans to kidnap the Conservative who beat him. There's nothing as bad as democracy.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: When a customer starts chatting up Shirley in the shop, she decides to move on from Wolfie - which means the fearless leader may have to move out of her spare room.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie is on the lookout for any money-making opportunity he can find. When Ken's attention is firmly taken up by pavement art, Citizen Smith may have found his answer.

programme.title: The Little Mermaid
programme.desc: A young mermaid makes a deal with a sea witch to trade her beautiful voice for human legs so she can discover the world above water and impress a prince. Starring Halle Bailey. (2023)

programme.title: Never Mind The Buzzcocks
programme.desc: Season Finale: Leigh-Anne Pinnock, Harry Hill and Ricky Wilson join the regulars for a festive rendition of the popular panel show, hosted by Greg Davies.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The last seven chefs fight for one of the five coveted black jackets; three WWE champions give the chefs their first task of the day; the chefs must put their own twist on pizza.

programme.title: Dead Ahead
programme.desc: Series Premiere: The Wharekoa whānau arrive in Aotearoa and Nate quickly makes a new friend that leads him down an unknown path that sends his whānau into a frenzy. S1 E1

programme.title: Gladiators UK
programme.desc: In the second semi-final, tensions rise between the Gladiators, resulting in a scrap in the arena as four determined Contenders battle for a coveted place in the grand final.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined in the studio by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: Night two of the Battles sees 16 artists going head-to-head to secure a coveted spot in the Knockouts.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Ninjago Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When two evil brothers manipulate the past and future to control all of Ninjago, the ninjas must retrieve the lost time blades to stop them.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran discovers her new boyfriend has a secret, which could cost Maxwell a fortune. S2 E9

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: This week we are at GLOW UP DAY in Otara, Fresh Dramedy shows us what happens when you take your Samoan BF home to meet your palagi parents and Fresh Beats is in Mt Wellington.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: The reckoning arrives.

programme.title: School Spirits
programme.desc: Season Finale: In a thrilling finale, Maddie finally pieces together the puzzle of her disappearance which has severe consequences in both the spirit and living worlds. S1 E8

programme.title: Destination X UK
programme.desc: The European bus trip goes off-road and off the rails as the players find themselves in another mystery country. This time, host Rob Brydon has even more tricks up his sleeve. S1 E3

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Season Finale: A long‑awaited achievement sparks an office celebration that brings unresolved feelings and realizations to the surface. S1 E20

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: Buck, a lovable bachelor who has a reputation for being slovenly and reckless, is left in charge of his brother's children during a family emergency. Stars John Candy and Macaulay Culkin. (1989)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy have their first fight since moving in together. And Raj quickly learns the reality of having to fend for himself when his father cuts him off financially. S10 E16

programme.title: Netball: ANZ Premiership
programme.desc: Live coverage of the Grand Final in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season.

programme.title: The Huntsman - Winter's War
programme.desc: Eric and fellow warrior Sara, raised as members of Ice Queen Freya's army, try to conceal their forbidden love as they fight to survive the wicked intentions of both Freya and her sister. (2016)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Season Finale: A new Taskmaster Champion will be crowned once the dust, feathers and lint have all settled.

programme.title: American Princess
programme.desc: Amanda and David are forced to take a corporate group around the Renaissance Festival together. Brian and Juan Andres double date with Natasha, Phil and Stephen. S1 E9

programme.title: Citadel
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Top agents of the independent spy organization Citadel – collide with a nefarious, new syndicate – Manticore – leading to catastrophe. S1 E1

programme.title: Vampire Academy
programme.desc: The aftermath of the Trials throws the Dominion into chaos. Christian faces a horrific truth. Rose takes drastic measures for her future. S1 E9

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: Season Finale: Luce believes she was murdered; Daniel confronts Miss Miriam, and Cam faces Howson; Luce seeks answers from Miss Sophia; Daniel saves her, and they reconcile. S1 E8

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: This week we are at GLOW UP DAY in Otara, Fresh Dramedy shows us what happens when you take your Samoan BF home to meet your palagi parents and Fresh Beats is in Mt Wellington.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: This New Zealand-made animation sees the TĀKARO TRIBE on a learning adventure in Te Wao Arapū (the magical Alphabet Forest), along with Pāpā Rākau (Tree father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother).

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Meet Bluey, an inexhaustible six-year-old Blue Heeler dog who loves to play. She turns everyday family life into extraordinary adventures!

programme.title: Night Eyes
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of four film crews in their investigations of the various paranormal events that occur in their local area and their mission to help the locals deal with their ghostly problems.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien look like regular teenagers, usually. But together they are Ladybug and Cat Noir, the heroes that protect Paris from the evil Hawk Moth!

programme.title: Animaniacs
programme.desc: They're back! The Warner brothers, Yakko and Wakko, and the Warner sister Dot — three inseparable, irascible siblings — have a great time wreaking havoc and mayhem in the lives of everyone they me

programme.title: Island of Mystery
programme.desc: Josh and his dog crash back 700 years in time, to a mysterious land where taniwhas roam and ancient warriors rule.

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: They're young, passionate and all putting in the hard yards to become NZ's best young riders. Follow the group of friends and their horses throughout the competition season.

programme.title: What Now?
programme.desc: Come and join the party! Catch Aashma, Imy, Manu and Rahil for gunge, cream pies, challenges, prizes and adventures across Aotearoa! Haere mai ki te whare o te hūwareware!

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran and C.C. find themselves locked in Maxwell's wine cellar. S2 E10

programme.title: The Voice U.S.A
programme.desc: The remaining artists compete to make it to the live finale; tough decisions are made when coaches Niall Horan and Snoop Dogg can only advance one artist each.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Harper struggles with Archie's absence. Eden gives Lacey some perspective. Has Abigail moved on?
